debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
hn : 100 ≤ n
S : Finset ℕ
hS : S ⊆ Finset.Icc n (2 * n)
⊢ (∃ a ∈ S, ∃ b ∈ S, a ≠ b ∧ IsSquare (a + b)) ∨
    ∃ a ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S, ∃ b ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S, a ≠ b ∧ IsSquare (a + b)

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
let k := (n + 1).sqrt - 1
  let x : Fin 5 → ℕ
    | 0 => 2 * k * k - 4 * k + 1
    | 1 => 2 * k * k + 4 * k - 1
    | 2 => 2 * k * k + 2
    | 3 => 2 * k * k - 2
    | 4 => 2 * k * k - 4 * k + 3
  have hk : 9 ≤ k := by
    have h10 : 10 ≤ (n + 1).sqrt := Nat.le_sqrt.mpr (by linarith)
    exact Nat.le_sub_of_add_le h10
  have hx_in : ∀ i : Fin 5, x i ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := by
    intro i
    let m := (n + 1).sqrt
    have hm : 10 ≤ m := Nat.le_sqrt.mpr (by linarith)
    have hm2 : m * m ≤ n + 1 := Nat.sqrt_le (n + 1)
    have hm2' : n + 1 < (m + 1) * (m + 1) := Nat.lt_succ_sqrt (n + 1)
    fin_cases i <;> (simp [x, k]; zify [hk, hm]; linarith [hm2, hm2'])
  by_contra! h
  obtain ⟨h1, h2⟩ := h
  have h_color : ∀ i : Fin 5, (x i ∈ S ↔ x (i + 1) ∉ S) := by
    intro i
    have h_diff : x i ≠ x (i + 1) := by fin_cases i <;> (simp [x, k]; zify [hk]; linarith)
    have h_sq : IsSquare (x i + x (i + 1)) := by
      fin_cases i
      · use 2 * k; simp [x]; ring
      · use 2 * k + 1; simp [x]; ring
      · use 2 * k; simp [x]; ring
      · use 2 * k - 1; zify [hk]; simp [x]; ring
      · use 2 * k - 2; zify [hk]; simp [x]; ring
    constructor
    · intro hi hnext; exact h1 (x i) hi (x (i + 1)) hnext h_diff h_sq
    · intro hni1 hni; exact h2 (x i) (by simp [hx_in i, hni]) (x (i + 1)) (by simp [hx_in (i + 1), hni1]) h_diff h_sq
  have h0 := h_color 0
  have h1 := h_color 1
  have h2 := h_color 2
  have h3 := h_color 3
  have h4 := h_color 4
  simp_all only [not_true_eq_false, not_false_eq_true, iff_true, iff_false]
  aesop

end IMO2021P1
